markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Rinky Hijikata wins set 4 in the Jesper De Jong vs Rinky Hijikata professional tennis match in the 2026 Wimbledon Men Singles Round Of 128, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Jesper De Jong vs Rinky Hijikata professional tennis match in the 2026 Wimbledon Men Singles Round Of 128. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks). If a retirement occurs, all markets that can be unconditionally settled based on play already completed will resolve accordingly. Any markets that cannot be unconditionally settled will resolve to Fair Market Price, as determined at the sole discretion of the Exchange.
markets.title: Will Rinky Hijikata win set 4 in the Jesper De Jong vs Rinky Hijikata match

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Matias Galarza records at least 1 assist during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Germany vs Paraguay professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 29, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Germany vs Paraguay professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 29, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's assists recorded.
markets.title: Matias Galarza: 1+ assists?
